text.div:
Sponsor Confidentiality Statement:This study does not have a confidentiality statement, but this is an example of how the data would appear if there was such a statement.
Full Title:A Study of Nasal Glucagon (LY900018) in Japanese Participants With Diabetes Mellitus - M11 Example
Sponsor Protocol Identifier:I8R-JE-IGBJ
Original Protocol:[Original Protocol Indicator]
Version Number:[For use by the sponsor at their discretion.]
Version Date:[For use by the sponsor at their discretion.]
Sponsor’s Investigational Product Code(s):[Enter the sponsor’s unique identifier for investigational product(s) in the trial.Add fields as needed.]
Investigational Product Name(s):[Omit nonproprietary name field if a nonproprietary name has not yet been assigned. Omit proprietary name field if not yet established.]
Trial Phase:Phase 3
Short Title:M11 IGBJ EXAMPLE
Sponsor Name and Address:

[Enter Sponsor Name.]

[Enter Sponsor Legal Address.]

[Add headings and lines for each Co-Sponsor Name and Address: and Local Sponsor Name and Address: if needed.]

Device Manufacturer Name and Address:[Manufacturer name and address information is required only for drug / device combination protocols that include investigational device(s) and should not be included for other protocols.Include the manufacturer address only if the manufacturer is different than the sponsor listed above. Add additional fields as needed if multiple investigational devices will be used in the trial or if there are multiple manufacturers for a single device. Delete this line if not applicable.]
Regulatory or Clinical Trial Identifier(s):

FOI 267245

ClinicalTrials.gov NCT03421379

identifier 16962 assigned by Eli Lilly and Company

Amendment Identifier I8R-JE-IGBJ(a)

Sponsor Approval:[Enter Sponsor Approval Date or State location where sponsor approval information can be found]

Sponsor Signatory: [Enter sponsor signatory (e.g., name, title, signature and date, or tate location where sponsor signatory information can be found (e.g., electronic signature)]

Medical Expert Contact: [Enter Medical Expert contact information(as designated by sponsor, or State location where Medical Expert contact information can be found]

Amendment Details [For an original protocol that has not been amended, state { This protocol has not been amended.} Otherwise state { This is the first protocol amendment.} Or { This protocol has been amended previously. Details of prior amendments are presented in Section 12.3 Prior Protocol Amendment(s).}]
